creator: edward@edcom.com
text:
just a sample of the problems:

  [1]	* the package name is web2c-6.1, though it's really Tex
  [2]	* doens't uninstall correctly
  [3]	* makes directories with mode 777
  [4]	* comes with the bibtex binary, but no bst files
  [5]	* no pk fonts at all
  [6]	* MakeTeXPK should put generated pk files in a more permanant place
	  (or is that in the dvips package?)

Fix: 

Don't know.  Perhaps the person who put it there can contact
	me and we can work on it.
